text: Water boils at one hundred degrees Celsius.

一个圆有三百六十度。

В круге триста шестьдесят градусов.

Break a leg before your performance.
祝你演出顺利。
公演がうまくいくといいね。

He let the cat out of the bag.
他泄露了秘密。

She hit the nail on the head.

The ball is in your court now.

He kicked the bucket last year.

她昨天给了他一份礼物。

这些书被学生们读过了。

If it rains tomorrow, I will stay home.
如果明天下雨，我会待在家里。

他从早上就开始工作了。

I would have gone if I had known.
如果我知道的话，我就去了。
知っていたら行っていただろう。

Neither she nor he was present.
她和他都不在场。

The faster you work, the sooner you finish.

Despite the rain, we continued walking.
尽管下雨，我们继续走路。
雨にもかかわらず、私たちは歩き続けた。

It was not until noon that he arrived.
直到中午他才到达。
彼が到着したのは正午になってからだった。

I feel a deep sense of loneliness tonight.
今晚我感到深深的孤独。

The unexpected kindness moved him to tears.

There is a bittersweet feeling about leaving.

He felt a quiet pride in his work.

The nostalgia for home never fades.

The joy of reunion after long separation.
长期分离后重聚的喜悦。

The silence between them was comfortable.
他们之间的沉默是舒适的。
